text:
The Unnamed Bunny is an anime-only animal in the 1999 anime adaptation. Hunter × Hunter - Episode 24 (1999) 

Appearance

The Zevil island bunny has two pointy large ears, a fluffy tail, red eyes, and a beige fur.

Plot

Hunter Exam arc

After Gon and Hisoka's encounter during the fourth phase of the 287th Hunter Exam. The Unnamed Bunny befriended and helped Gon, who was struggling from Geretta's toxins and Hisoka's punch.
